text:
On Mon, Sep 17, 2007 at 10:46:40AM -0400, Thomas Abthorpe wrote:
> Hi Alexander
> 
> If you would like, we can declare a submitter timeout on this patch. That said 
> would you like to remove files/patch-src_zipmerge.c or keep it in?

Taking into account that we did not get clarification why original
submitter applied the patch to zipmerge.c file I guess we can omit it from the update patch.

Thank you.
